comments: Ian Gillan sits in for Tommy Vance, whilst on holiday.
This show consists of the first 90 minutes of a 2 hour programme.

track_listing.track: Addicted To Love (album - Riptide) Island
(We Are) The Road Crew (album - Ace Of Spades) Bronze
Mississippi Queen (album - Climbing!) Bell
Boys Cry Out For War (album - For The Working Class Man) Mushroom
Gillan chats to Roger Glover, Deep Purple's bass player who chooses his tracks below
Good Golly, Miss Molly (album - Little Richard) Specialty
Gillan continues chatting to Roger Glover
Why Can't This Be Love (album - 5150) Warner Bros.
Gillan continues chatting to Roger Glover
Maybellene (album - Berry Is On Top) Chess
Her Eyes
Still The One
Rock 'N' Roll Rebel (album - Bark At The Moon) CBS
Gillan chats to Roger Glover after coming back from the pub
